title: Video MCQ Open-Ended Task Annotation
description: Multiple-choice question task annotation where the answer begins with a single letter followed by an open-ended explanation. Each item poses a question (optionally with explicit options) for the video or image identified by video_id or image_id.

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

items.description: Array of classification items, one per video or image

video_id.description: Reference to video ID (matches directory name in contextual/)

question.description: Classification question. May embed the options inline (e.g. 'A) car B) truck ...')

options.description: Optional mapping of answer letter to choice text (e.g. {"A": "passenger car", "B": "truck"}). Use when choices are not embedded in the question.

answer.description: Answer starting with a single uppercase letter identifying the correct option, followed by a period, a space, and an open-ended explanation (e.g. 'A. The vehicle is a passenger car.')

reasoning.description: Optional step-by-step reasoning trace leading to the answer

item_metadata.description: Optional additional metadata for this item

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search
